Localization.Description: A suspicious logon to a host with access to the 1C application. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: New user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} logged in to host {event_src.host} with access to the 1C application. The user is missing from the collected profile.
User {subject.account.name} from new host {src.host} logged in to host {event_src.host} with access to the 1C application. The address is missing from the collected profile.

User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} accessed a new object in shared network resource "{object.storage.name}" after logging in to host {event_src.host} with access to the 1C application. The object is missing from the collected profile.

User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} used new logon type {logon_type} ({datafield6}) to log in to host {event_src.host} with access to the 1C application. The logon type is missing from the collected profile.

User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} accessed new shared network resource "{object.storage.path}" after logging in to host {event_src.host} with access to the 1C application. The network resource is missing from the collected profile.
